name: Mean Reversion
description: Counter-move model that fades statistically stretched price once rejection and re-acceptance back toward value appear.

context: Mark the session mean, VWAP, and prior swing extremes before entry.
Only fade when price is extended into known liquidity or deviation zones.
Prefer the first clean rejection after a sweep, not repeated attempts.
setup: Price tags an outer band, prior high or low, or deviation threshold.
A rejection wick or failed auction appears at the extreme.
Momentum slows and closes stop progressing in trend direction.
trigger: Enter on reclaim back inside the prior range after the sweep.
Use a lower-high or higher-low break as the execution trigger.
Scale only if the rejection structure tightens the invalidation.
confirmation: Stretch or displacement is visibly extended.
The extreme is rejected with wick imbalance or failed breakout behavior.
The target path back to mean is open and not blocked immediately by chop.
invalidation: Price accepts outside the deviation zone with consecutive closes.
Trend accelerates after the rejection instead of stalling.
A new session expansion resets the regime.
noTrade: High-impact news just reset the market regime.
The mean is too close to justify the trade.
You are fading strong multi-timeframe momentum without exhaustion.

stopLoss: Place stop beyond the sweep high or low or beyond the deviation band.
Keep stop outside obvious noise, not inside the rejection wick midpoint.
Skip the trade if the invalidation point is too loose.
takeProfit: First target is the local mean, VWAP, or middle of the range.
Second target can be the opposite side of balance only if reversal strengthens.
Lock partials quickly because fades lose edge once mean is reclaimed.
timeExit: Close if reversion does not start within 2 to 5 candles after entry.
Flatten before the active session reopens if the fade was session-specific.
Do not hold once range conditions disappear.
earlyExit: Price reclaims the extreme and holds beyond it.
Mean is touched but price cannot continue through balance.
A fresh impulse candle invalidates the rejection narrative.
